home.title: Gamified Learning for Rural Education
home.subtitle: A playful, offline-first platform that boosts motivation, builds skills, and supports teachers with real-time insights.
home.heroCardText: Students earn stars, unlock badges, and move through levels while learning real skills for life.
home.impactDescription: Game mechanics are designed for social good, not just fun. Each quest aligns with real community values.

impactCards.title: Community Stories
impactCards.text: Local stories and folk themes make lessons relatable and respectful.

impactCards.title: Real-world Quests
impactCards.text: Mini missions teach practical skills like saving water, hygiene, and teamwork.

impactCards.title: Positive Habits
impactCards.text: Badges reward kindness, honesty, and collaborative learning.

howCards.title: Micro-lessons
howCards.text: Small, focused lessons that fit short study sessions.

howCards.title: Offline-first
howCards.text: Works without internet, syncs when connectivity returns.

howCards.title: Teacher dashboard
howCards.text: Tracks progress and highlights who needs support.

problem.title: Rural Education Challenges
problem.lead: Students face limited resources, infrastructure gaps, and fewer trained teachers. This limits exposure to digital tools and reduces learning outcomes.

cards.title: Limited Access
cards.text: Low device availability and weak internet reduce learning opportunities.

cards.title: Motivation Drop
cards.text: Traditional rote learning leads to low engagement and confidence.

cards.title: Support Gap
cards.text: Teachers need tools to track progress and personalize help.

solution.title: The Gamified Solution
solution.lead: A child-friendly, multilingual platform with adaptive learning, rewards, and teacher insights.

features.title: Points, badges, levels
features.text: Learners gain rewards for steady progress.

features.title: Cultural relevance
features.text: Stories and examples reflect local contexts.

features.title: AI Tutor
features.text: A friendly helper answers doubts and adapts questions.

technology.title: Technology Stack
technology.lead: Lightweight, mobile-first engineering that works in low-bandwidth settings.

stack.title: Game engines
stack.text: Unity or Phaser for interactive learning loops.

stack.title: Adaptive learning
stack.text: AI/ML adjusts difficulty based on learner progress.

stack.title: Offline caching
stack.text: Local storage + sync for unreliable connectivity.

stack.title: Multimodal content
stack.text: Video, quizzes, animations, and AR-ready modules.

stack.title: Analytics
stack.text: Cloud dashboards for teachers and researchers.

method.title: Proposed Work
method.lead: A five-step roadmap from research to field validation.

steps.title: Data collection
steps.text: Survey teachers, map language needs, and note connectivity limits.

steps.title: Platform architecture
steps.text: Curriculum, gamification, and delivery layers are modular.

steps.title: Adaptive personalization
steps.text: Difficulty adjusts based on mastery and confidence.

steps.title: Motivation model
steps.text: Quests, teamwork, and culturally relevant rewards.

steps.title: Evaluation
steps.text: Pre/post testing, engagement metrics, and feedback loops.

results.title: Results Snapshot
results.lead: Pilot testing showed stronger engagement and improved learning outcomes.

cards.title: Model Accuracy
cards.text: Prediction accuracy reached 0.91 with loss at 0.35.

tutor.subject: Subject
tutor.noQuestion: No question yet. Start the diagnostic first.
tutor.growthNote: Tracks performance change across recent attempts.

teacher.title: Teacher Hub
teacher.subtitle: Create chapters by grade, assign them to students, and track growth.
teacher.analyticsNote: Select a student to view accuracy trend and growth.

student.title: Student Hub
student.subtitle: Learn through assigned chapters and track your progress.
student.aiNote: Type your doubt and get a friendly explanation.
student.aiFallback: Sorry, the AI helper is not available right now.
student.warningText: You have been using the app for 60 minutes. Please take a 5–10 minute rest.
